name: OmopMedicationDrugExposureView
title: Medication → drug_exposure (flat)
description: The FHIR Medication resource is a vocabulary/codeable-concept resource, not a medication event. It does NOT directly produce a drug_exposure row. Instead, its code and ingredient data are resolved into drug_concept_id and drug_source_value on drug_exposure rows produced by the four event resources (MedicationRequest, MedicationDispense, MedicationAdministration, MedicationStatement). This edge documents how Medication fields contribute to drug_exposure columns when referenced.

column.name: drug_concept_id
column.description: Set by the event mapper after resolving medicationReference. The 'best' coding is selected by vocabulary priority. — transform: Vocabulary lookup: resolve best coding (RxNorm > NDC > ATC > SNOMED) to OMOP standard concept via CONCEPT table

column.name: drug_source_value
column.description: Raw source code from the highest-priority coding in Medication.code

column.name: drug_source_concept_id
column.description: The source concept before mapping to standard vocabulary — transform: Look up source vocabulary concept_id for the raw code (non-standard concept)

where.description: Medication does not directly produce drug_exposure rows. Its code/ingredient data flows into drug_exposure via event resources (MedicationRequest, MedicationDispense, MedicationAdministration, MedicationStatement) when they carry a medicationReference pointing to a Medication resource.
